name: Elite Soldier
description: An armored squire or experienced commoner looking to advance.

features.name: Reinforce
features.description: Move into Melee range of an ally and make a standard attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, deal 2d10+2 physical damage and the ally can clear a Stress.

features.name: Vassal's Loyalty
features.description: When the Soldier is within Very Close range of a knight or other noble who would take damage, move into Melee range of them and take the damage instead.

name: Failed Experiment
description: A magical necromantic experiment gone wrong, leaving them warped and ungainly.

features.name: Warped Fortitude
features.description: The Experiment is resistant to physical damage.

features.name: Overwhelm
features.description: When a target the Experiment attacks has other adversaries within Very Close range, the Experiment deals double damage.

features.name: Lurching Lunge
features.description: Spotlight the Experiment as an additional GM move instead of spending Fear.

name: Giant Beastmaster
description: A leather-clad warrior bearing a whip and massive bow.

features.name: Two as One
features.description: When the Beastmaster is spotlighted, you can also spotlight a Tier 1 animal adversary currently under their control.

features.name: Pinning Strike
features.description: Make a standard attack against a target. On a success, pin them to a nearby surface. The pinned target is Restrained until they break free with a successful Finesse or Strength Roll.

features.name: Deadly Companion
features.description: Twice per scene, summon a Bear, Dire Wolf, or similar Tier 1 animal adversary under the Beastmaster's control. The adversary appears at Close range and is immediately spotlighted.

name: Giant Brawler
description: An especially muscular giant wielding a warhammer larger than a human.

features.name: Battering Ram
features.description: Charge at an inanimate object within Close range and destroy it. All targets within Very Close range of the object must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll or take 2d4+3 physical damage from the shrapnel.

features.name: Bloody Reprisal
features.description: When the Brawler marks 2 or more HP from an attack within Very Close range, make a standard attack against the attacker. On a success, deal 2d6+15 physical damage instead of standard damage.

features.name: Momentum
features.description: When the Brawler makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.

name: Giant Recruit
description: A giant fighter wearing borrowed armor.

features.name: Minion (7)
features.description: The Recruit is defeated when they take any damage. For every 7 damage a PC deals to the Recruit, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.

features.name: Group Attack
features.description: Choose a target and spotlight all Giant Recruits within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 5 physical damage each. Combine this damage.

name: Electric Eels
description: A swarm of shocking aquatic predators.

features.name: Horde (2d4+1)
features.description: When the Eels have marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 2d4+1 physical damage instead.

features.name: Paralyzing Shock
features.description: Make a standard attack against all targets within Very Close range. You gain a Fear for each target that marks HP.

name: Minotaur Wrecker
description: A massive bull-headed firbolg with a quick temper.

features.name: Ramp Up
features.description: You must spend a Fear to spotlight the Minotaur. While spotlighted, they can make their standard attack against all targets within range.

features.name: Charging Bull
features.description: Charge through a group within Close range and make an attack against all targets in the Minotaur's path. Targets the Minotaur succeeds against take 2d6+8 physical damage and are knocked back to Very Far range. If a target is knocked into a solid object or another creature, they take an extra 1d6 damage (combine the damage).

features.name: Gore
features.description: Make an attack against a target within Very Close range, moving the Minotaur into Melee range of them. On a success, deal 2d8 direct physical damage.

name: Giant Eagle
description: A giant bird of prey with blood-stained talons.

features.name: Flight
features.description: While flying, the Eagle gains a +3 bonus to their Difficulty.

features.name: Deadly Dive
features.description: Attack a target within Far range. On a success, deal 2d10+2 physical damage and knock the target over, making them Vulnerable until they next act.

features.name: Take Off
features.description: Make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, deal 2d4+3 physical damage and the target must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll or become temporarily Restrained within the Eagle's massive talons.

name: Gorgon
description: A snake-headed, scaled humanoid with a gilded bow, enraged that their peace has been disturbed.

features.name: Relentless (2)
features.description: The Gorgon can be spotlighted up to two times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.

features.name: Sunsear Arrows
features.description: When the Gorgon makes a successful standard attack, the target Glows until the end of the scene and can't become Hidden. Attack rolls made against a Glowing target have advantage.

features.name: Crown of Serpents
features.description: Make an attack roll against a target within Melee range using the Gorgon's protective snakes. On a success, deal 2d10+4 physical damage and the target must mark a Stress.

features.name: Petrifying Gaze
features.description: When the Gorgon takes damage from an attack within Close range, force the attacker to make an Instinct Reaction Roll. On a failure, they begin to turn to stone, marking a HP and starting a Petrification Countdown (4). This countdown ticks down when the Gorgon is attacked. When it triggers, the target must make a death move. If the Gorgon is defeated, all petrification countdowns end.

features.name: Momentum
features.description: When the Gorgon makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.

name: Merchant Baron
description: An accomplished merchant with a large operation under their command.

features.name: Everyone Has a Price
features.description: Offer a target a dangerous bargain for something they want or need. If used on a PC, they must make a Presence Reaction Roll (17). On a failure, they must mark 2 Stress or take the deal.

features.name: The Best Muscle Money Can Buy
features.description: Once per scene, summon 1d4+1 Tier 1 adversaries, who appear at Far range, to enforce the Baron's will.

name: Archer Squadron
description: A group of trained archers bearing massive bows.

features.name: Horde (1d6+3)
features.description: When the Squadron has marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 1d6+3 physical damage instead.

features.name: Focused Volley
features.description: Target a point within Far range. Make an attack with advantage against all targets within Close range of that point. Targets the Squadron succeeds against take 1d10+4 physical damage.

features.name: Suppressing Fire
features.description: Target a point within Far range. Until the next roll with Fear, a creature who moves within Close range of that point must make an Agility Reaction Roll. On a failure, they take 2d6+3 physical damage. On a success, they take half damage.

name: Apprentice Assassin
description: A young trainee eager to prove themselves.

features.name: Minion (6)
features.description: The Assassin is defeated when they take any damage. For every 6 damage a PC deals to the Assassin, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.

features.name: Group Attack
features.description: Choose a target and spotlight all Apprentice Assassins within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 4 physical damage each. Combine this damage.

name: Assassin Poisoner
description: A cunning scoundrel skilled in both poisons and ambushing.

features.name: Grindletooth Venom
features.description: Targets who mark HP from the Assassin's attacks are Vulnerable until they clear a HP.

features.name: Out of Nowhere
features.description: The Assassin has advantage on attacks if they are Hidden.

features.name: Fumigation
features.description: Drop a smoke bomb that fills the air within Close range with smoke, Dizzying all targets in this area. Dizzied targets have disadvantage on their next action roll, then clear the condition.

name: Master Assassin
description: A seasoned killer with a threatening voice and a deadly blade.

features.name: Won't See It Coming
features.description: The Assassin deals direct damage while they're Hidden.

features.name: Strike as One
features.description: Spotlight a number of other Assassins equal to the Assassin's unmarked Stress.

features.name: The Subtle Blade
features.description: When the Assassin successfully makes a standard attack against a Vulnerable target, deal Severe damage instead of their standard damage.

features.name: Momentum
features.description: When the Assassin makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.

name: Battle Box
description: A cube-shaped construct with a different rune on each of their six sides.

features.name: Relentless (2)
features.description: The Box can be spotlighted up to two times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.

features.name: Randomized Tactics
features.description: Roll a d6. 1: Mana Beam — attack Far, 2d10+2 mag. 2: Fire Jets — attack all Close, 2d8 phy. 3: Trample — attack all Close, 1d6+5 phy + Vulnerable. 4: Shocking Gas — Finesse Reaction or mark 3 Stress. 5: Stunning Clap — Strength Reaction or Vulnerable. 6: Psionic Whine — Presence Reaction or 2d4+9 direct mag.

features.name: Overcharge
features.description: Before rolling damage for the Box's attack, add a d6 to the damage roll. Additionally, you gain a Fear.

features.name: Death Quake
features.description: When the Box marks their last HP, the magic powering them ruptures in an explosion. All targets within Close range must succeed on an Instinct Reaction Roll or take 2d8+1 magic damage.

name: Chaos Skull
description: A floating humanoid skull animated by scintillating magic.

features.name: Levitation
features.description: The Skull levitates several feet off the ground and can't be Restrained.

features.name: Wards
features.description: The Skull is resistant to magic damage.

features.name: Magic Burst
features.description: Make an attack against all targets within Close range. Targets the Skull succeeds against take 2d6+4 magic damage.

features.name: Siphon Magic
features.description: Make an attack against a PC with a Spellcast trait within Very Close range. On a success, the target marks 1d4 Stress and the Skull clears that many Stress. On a success, the Skull can immediately be spotlighted again.

name: Conscript
description: A poorly trained civilian pressed into war.

features.name: Minion (6)
features.description: The Conscript is defeated when they take any damage. For every 6 damage a PC deals to the Conscript, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.

features.name: Group Attack
features.description: Choose a target and spotlight all Conscripts within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 6 physical damage each. Combine this damage.

name: Courtesan
description: An accomplished manipulator and master of the social arts.

features.name: Searing Glance
features.description: When a PC within Close range makes a Presence Roll, cast a gaze toward the aftermath. On the target's failure, they must mark 2 Stress and are Vulnerable until the scene ends or they succeed on a social action against the Courtesan. On the target's success, they must mark a Stress.

name: Cult Adept
description: An experienced mage wielding shadow and fear.

features.name: Enervating Blast
features.description: Make a standard attack against a target within range. On a success, the target must mark a Stress.

features.name: Shroud of the Fallen
features.description: Wrap an ally within Close range in a shroud of Protection until the Adept marks their last HP. While Protected, the target has resistance to all damage.

features.name: Shadow Shackles
features.description: Choose a point within Far range. All targets within Close range of that point are Restrained in smoky chains until they break free with a successful Strength or Instinct Roll. A target Restrained by this feature must spend a Hope to make an action roll.

features.name: Fear Is Fuel
features.description: Twice per scene, when a PC rolls a failure with Fear, clear a Stress.

name: Cult Fang
description: A professional killer-turned-cultist.

features.name: Shadow's Embrace
features.description: The Fang can climb and walk on vertical surfaces. Mark a Stress to move from one shadow to another within Far range.

features.name: Pick Off the Straggler
features.description: Cause a target within Melee range to make an Instinct Reaction Roll. On a failure, the target must mark 2 Stress and is teleported with the Fang to a shadow within Far range, making them temporarily Vulnerable. On a success, the target must mark a Stress.

name: Cult Initiate
description: A low-ranking cultist in simple robes, eager to gain power.

features.name: Minion (6)
features.description: The Initiate is defeated when they take any damage. For every 6 damage a PC deals to the Initiate, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.

features.name: Group Attack
features.description: Choose a target and spotlight all Cult Initiates within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 5 physical damage each. Combine this damage.

name: Demonic Hound Pack
description: Unnatural hounds lit from within by hellfire.

features.name: Horde (2d4+1)
features.description: When the Pack has marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 2d4+1 physical damage instead.

features.name: Dreadhowl
features.description: Make all targets within Very Close range lose a Hope. If a target is not able to lose a Hope, they must instead mark 2 Stress.

features.name: Momentum
features.description: When the Pack makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.

name: Juvenile Flickerfly
description: A horse-sized insect with iridescent scales and crystalline wings moving faster than the eye can see.

features.name: Relentless (3)
features.description: The Flickerfly can be spotlighted up to three times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.

features.name: Peerless Accuracy
features.description: Before the Flickerfly makes an attack, roll a d6. On a result of 4 or higher, the target's Evasion is halved against this attack.

features.name: Mind Dance
features.description: Create a magically dazzling display that grapples the minds of nearby foes. All targets within Close range must make an Instinct Reaction Roll. For each target who failed, you gain a Fear and the Flickerfly learns one of the target's fears.

features.name: Hallucinatory Breath
features.description: Countdown (Loop 1d6). When the Flickerfly takes damage for the first time, activate the countdown. When it triggers, breathe hallucinatory gas on all targets in front of them up to Far range. Targets must succeed on an Instinct Reaction Roll or be tormented by fearful hallucinations. Targets whose fears are known have disadvantage. Targets who fail must mark a Stress and lose a Hope.

name: Knight of the Realm
description: A decorated soldier with heavy armor and a powerful steed.

features.name: Chevalier
features.description: While the Knight is on a mount, they gain a +2 bonus to their Difficulty. When they take Severe damage, they're knocked from their mount and lose this benefit until they're next spotlighted.

features.name: Heavily Armored
features.description: When the Knight takes physical damage, reduce it by 3.

features.name: Cavalry Charge
features.description: If the Knight is mounted, move up to Far range and make a standard attack against a target. On a success, deal 2d8+4 physical damage and the target must mark a Stress.

features.name: For the Realm!
features.description: Spotlight 1d4+1 allies. Attacks they make while spotlighted in this way deal half damage.

name: Masked Thief
description: A cunning thief with acrobatic skill and a flair for the dramatic.

features.name: Quick Hands
features.description: Make an attack against a target within Melee range. On a success, deal 1d8+2 physical damage and the Thief steals one item or consumable from the target's inventory.

features.name: Escape Plan
features.description: Reveal a snare trap set anywhere on the battlefield. All targets within Very Close range must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll (13) or be pulled off their feet and suspended upside down. A target is Restrained and Vulnerable until they break free with a successful Finesse or Strength Roll (13).

name: Mortal Hunter
description: An undead figure wearing a heavy leather coat, with searching eyes and a casually cruel demeanor.

features.name: Terrifying
features.description: When the Hunter makes a successful attack, all PCs within Far range lose a Hope and you gain a Fear.

features.name: Deathlock
features.description: Curse a target within Very Close range with a necrotic Deathlock until the end of the scene. Attacks made by the Hunter against a Deathlocked target deal direct damage. The Hunter can only maintain one Deathlock at a time.

features.name: Inevitable Death
features.description: Spotlight 1d4 allies. Attacks they make while spotlighted in this way deal half damage.

features.name: Rampage
features.description: Countdown (Loop 1d6). When the Hunter is in the spotlight for the first time, activate the countdown. When it triggers, move the Hunter in a straight line to a point within Far range and make an attack against all targets in their path. Targets the Hunter succeeds against take 2d8+2 physical damage.

name: Royal Advisor
description: A high-ranking courtier with the ear of the local nobility.

features.name: Devastating Retort
features.description: A PC who rolls less than 17 on an action roll targeting the Advisor must mark a Stress.

features.name: Bend Ears
features.description: Influence an NPC within Melee range with whispered words. That target's opinion on one matter shifts toward the Advisor's preference unless it is in direct opposition to the target's motives.

features.name: Scapegoat
features.description: Convince a crowd or notable individual that one person or group is responsible for some problem facing the target. The target becomes hostile to the scapegoat until convinced of their innocence with a successful Presence Roll (17).

name: Secret-Keeper
description: A clandestine leader with a direct channel to the Fallen Gods.

features.name: Seize Your Moment
features.description: Spotlight 1d4 allies. Attacks they make while spotlighted in this way deal half damage.

features.name: Our Master's Will
features.description: When you spotlight an ally within Far range, gain a Fear.

features.name: Summoning Ritual
features.description: Countdown (6). When the Secret-Keeper is in the spotlight for the first time, activate the countdown. When they mark HP, tick down this countdown by the number of HP marked. When it triggers, summon a Minor Demon who appears at Close range.

features.name: Fallen Hounds
features.description: Once per scene, when the Secret-Keeper marks 2 or more HP, summon a Demonic Hound Pack, which appears at Close range and is immediately spotlighted.

name: Shark
description: A large aquatic predator, always on the move.

features.name: Terrifying
features.description: When the Shark makes a successful attack, all PCs within Far range lose a Hope and you gain a Fear.

features.name: Rending Bite
features.description: When the Shark makes a successful attack, the target must mark an Armor Slot without receiving its benefits. If they can't mark an Armor Slot, they must mark an additional HP.

features.name: Blood in the Water
features.description: When a creature within Close range of the Shark marks HP from another creature's attack, immediately spotlight the Shark, moving them into Melee range of the target and making a standard attack.

name: Siren
description: A half-fish person with shimmering scales and an irresistible voice.

features.name: Captive Audience
features.description: If the Siren makes a standard attack against a target Entranced by their song, the attack deals 2d10+1 damage instead of their standard damage.

features.name: Enchanting Song
features.description: Sing a song that affects all targets within Close range. Targets must succeed on an Instinct Reaction Roll or become Entranced until they mark 2 Stress. Other Sirens within Close range of the target can mark a Stress to each add a +1 bonus to the Difficulty of the reaction roll. While Entranced, a target can't act and is Vulnerable.

name: Spectral Archer
description: A ghostly fighter with an ethereal bow, unable to move on while their charge is vulnerable.

features.name: Ghost
features.description: The Archer has resistance to physical damage. Mark a Stress to move up to Close range through solid objects.

features.name: Pick Your Target
features.description: Make an attack within Far range against a PC who is within Very Close range of at least two other PCs. On a success, the target takes 2d8+12 physical damage.

name: Spectral Captain
description: A ghostly commander leading their troops beyond death.

features.name: Ghost
features.description: The Captain has resistance to physical damage. Mark a Stress to move up to Close range through solid objects.

features.name: Unending Battle
features.description: Return up to 1d4+1 defeated Spectral allies to the battle at the points where they first appeared (with no marked HP or Stress).

features.name: Hold Fast
features.description: When the Captain's Spectral allies are forced to make a reaction roll, give those allies a +2 bonus to the roll.

features.name: Momentum
features.description: When the Captain makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.

name: Spectral Guardian
description: A ghostly fighter with spears and swords, anchored by duty.

features.name: Ghost
features.description: The Guardian has resistance to physical damage. Mark a Stress to move up to Close range through solid objects.

features.name: Grave Blade
features.description: Make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, deal 2d10+6 physical damage and the target must mark a Stress.

name: Spy
description: A skilled espionage agent with a knack for being in the right place to overhear secrets.

features.name: Gathering Secrets
features.description: Describe how the Spy knows a secret about a PC in the scene.

features.name: Fly on the Wall
features.description: When a PC or group is discussing something sensitive, reveal that the Spy is present in the scene, observing them. If the Spy escapes the scene to report their findings, you gain 1d4 Fear.

name: Stonewraith
description: A prowling hunter, like a slinking mountain lion, with a slate-gray stone body.

features.name: Stonestrider
features.description: The Stonewraith can move through stone and earth as easily as air. While within stone or earth, they are Hidden and immune to all damage.

features.name: Rocky Ambush
features.description: While Hidden, leap into Melee range with a target within Very Close range. The target must succeed on an Agility or Instinct Reaction Roll (15) or take 2d8 physical damage and become temporarily Restrained.

features.name: Avalanche Roar
features.description: Roar while within a cave and cause a cave-in. All targets within Close range must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll (14) or take 2d10 physical damage. The rubble can be cleared with a Progress Countdown (8).

features.name: Momentum
features.description: When the Stonewraith makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.

name: War Wizard
description: A battle-hardened mage trained in destructive magic.

features.name: Battle Teleport
features.description: Before or after making a standard attack, you can mark a Stress to teleport to a location within Far range.

features.name: Refresh Warding Sphere
features.description: Refresh the Wizard's Warding Sphere reaction.

features.name: Eruption
features.description: Choose a point within Far range. A Very Close area around that point erupts into impassable terrain. All targets within that area must make an Agility Reaction Roll (14). Targets who fail take 2d10 physical damage and are thrown out of the area. Targets who succeed take half damage and aren't moved.

features.name: Arcane Artillery
features.description: Unleash a precise hail of magical blasts. All targets in the scene must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 2d12 magic damage. Targets who succeed take half damage.

features.name: Warding Sphere
features.description: When the Wizard takes damage from an attack within Close range, deal 2d6 magic damage to the attacker. This reaction can't be used again until refreshed.
